forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 85. West wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 56. North wind 3 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

weather_report:
As the afternoon sun graces Boston, the city emerges in vibrant hues, a tapestry of green and blue under an expansive sky. The warmth of the day draws people outdoors, where a gentle west wind carries with it a refreshing touch, rippling through the trees and mingling with the sounds of the city. It’s a day that feels alive, imbued with the promise of a pleasant evening. Dressed simply in light fabrics—a cotton shirt or a breezy dress—one might stroll along the Charles, savoring the serenity as the sun dips lower, casting golden rays that dance upon the water’s surface.

As twilight approaches, the skies will turn partly cloudy, offering a soft embrace to the cool evening air. A comfortable low wraps the landscape, inviting those who appreciate the nuances of a spring evening to take part in rather unassuming pleasures—perhaps enjoying a cup of coffee at an outdoor café or indulging in a quiet read at a park bench. Tonight's whispers of a gentle north wind hint at the perfect setting for conversations under the stars, bringing a serene end to a day that feels both easy and invigorating.
